creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Any reason why we can't use the official release tarball?
https://github.com/openMSX/openMSX/releases/tag/RELEASE_19_1 --> https://github.com/openMSX/openMSX/releases/download/RELEASE_19_1/openmsx-19.1.tar.gz

https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#makefile-master_sites-github
